title: OrchestrationStep
description: L3 — A single step within an orchestration flow: its position in the sequence, the kind of action it performs, the service or component that performs it, and its input/output payloads.

sequence.description: Zero-based position of the step within its owning flow.

actionType.description: The kind of action (e.g. invoke-service, publish-event, evaluate-decision).
